import sys
import argparse


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--mode", choices=["sync", "export", "import"])
    parser.add_argument("--format", default="json")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.mode == "sync":
        users = fetch_all_users()
        for user in users:
            if user["status"] == "active":
                if user["tier"] == "premium":
                    sync_premium_user(user)
                else:
                    sync_basic_user(user)
            elif user["status"] == "suspended":
                handle_suspended(user)
    elif args.mode == "export":
        data = load_export_data()
        if args.format == "csv":
            write_csv(data)
        elif args.format == "json":
            write_json(data)
        else:
            write_parquet(data)
    elif args.mode == "import":
        records = read_import_file()
        for record in records:
            if record["type"] == "user":
                import_user(record)
            elif record["type"] == "order":
                import_order(record)
            else:
                import_generic(record)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
